text: R3 β=0.01 + E3 full cohort: REGRESSION on both fc settings (−£8/d fc=120, −£13/d fc=0 vs E3 cohort); R3's probe-scale promise did not compound. R3 retired.

locator.quote: probe-scale → full-cohort regressions are real and the GA can't

text: The two retire decisions (R3, Sortino) form a pattern: probe-scale → full-cohort regressions are real and the GA can't be trusted to amplify a probe-scale signal under selection breeding.

locator.quote: variance, so the GA breeds agents that open fewer/safer pairs.

text: Sortino selector retired: it penalises downside variance, so the GA breeds agents that open fewer/safer pairs, losing the fc=0 naked-tailwind upside (−£45/d at fc=0).

locator.quote: max naked span compressed 1216 → 658 across gens 0–3

text: tnv's variance penalty DID produce selection pressure in-sample (max naked span compressed 1216 → 658 across gens 0–3, 46% reduction) yet no band cleared — in-sample pressure ≠ deployable result.
